title: HPE GreenLake Selected by BMW Group to Unify Data Management Across Global Locations and the Cloud
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that BMW Group, the world's leading premium manufacturer of automobiles and motorcycles, has selected the HPE GreenLake edge-to-cloud platform to streamline and unify data management across its global locations and the cloud. title: JCB Chooses HPE GreenLake to Enhance Customer Experience and Modernize its Next Generation MyJCB Platform
text: TOKYO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that JCB Co., Ltd., the international payment brand from Japan, has selected the HPE GreenLake edge-to-cloud platform to build the next generation of its MyJCB platform to improve customer engagement with the launch of new customer experiences and services. title: KDDI Advances O-RAN Compliant 5G Standalone Virtualized Base Stations in Japan with HPE Telco Infrastructure

KDDI is accelerating construction of 5G base stations across Japan in efforts to expedite 5G availability. title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Reports Fiscal 2022 First Quarter Results
